compiled_state.title: RED tests: assert no v2 code in issue-quality-check, check-acceptance-criteria, issue-summary, issue-batch, release-debug-lock, qualify-ticket-refs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) that assert v2 code is absent from 6 scripts that were missed in the original implementation plan:

1. issue-quality-check.sh — uses $TK variable to load tickets
2. check-acceptance-criteria.sh — uses $TK variable to load tickets
3. issue-summary.sh — uses $TK variable for ticket lookups
4. issue-batch.sh — uses $TK variable for batch operations
5. release-debug-lock.sh — uses $TK variable
6. qualify-ticket-refs.sh — uses $TK variable

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh with test functions asserting grep for TK= and 'tk ' patterns returns non-zero in each script
2. Verify all tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0; }

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh (Create)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — issue-quality-check.sh, check-acceptance-criteria.sh, issue-summary.sh, issue-batch.sh each have TK= assignment; release-debug-lock.sh has 'tk show' call; qualify-ticket-refs.sh has 'tk ' in comments only (no functional usage)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — created tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh with 12 test functions (2 per script: no TK= assignment, no functional tk invocation)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — test file is the implementation for this RED test task
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — tests run: 12, PASS: 4, FAIL: 8 (RED state confirmed, exit code 1)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC1: file executable ✓; AC2: tests fail on current codebase ✓ (8/12 RED); self-check: negation written as { cmd; test $? -ne 0; } in AC verification ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written and confirmed failing. 8/12 tests RED as expected.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
